official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound resource_pack_push packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound resource_pack_push body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed resource_pack_push packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed resource_pack_push packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the resource_pack_push body.
The official ClientboundResourcePackPushPacket.STREAM_CODEC writes UUID, URL, hash, required flag, and optional prompt fields.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundResourcePackPushPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundResourcePackPushPacket preserves UUID, URL, hash, required flag, and absent prompt for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove resource-pack UI behavior, pack download/reload/application behavior, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer resource-pack UI behavior, pack download/reload/application behavior, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
